## ScrollVisibilityObserver.unobserve() method

Stops observing the provided element.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
unobserve(element: HTMLElement): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  element | HTMLElement | The element to stop observing if it has entered in the view. |

<b>Returns:</b>

void
